pass_1.bdr_summary: InvoiceFlow - Invoice creation and payment tracking platform for solo freelancers. Users create branded PDF invoices, manage client database, track payment status, and receive automated overdue reminders. Targets freelance creatives billing 5-20 clients monthly with $500-5000 invoices. $29/month subscription model with SendGrid email integration and Stripe billing.

economics_snapshot.target_customer: Solo freelancers and consultants billing multiple clients monthly

questions_for_hero: Should automated reminders be configurable (7/14/30 days) or fixed at 7 days?
Do you want invoice templates or single branded format?
Should client portal be included in MVP or deferred to v2?

pass_2.approved_bdr: InvoiceFlow - Invoice creation and payment tracking platform for solo freelancers. Users create branded PDF invoices, manage client database, track payment status, and receive automated overdue reminders. Targets freelance creatives billing 5-20 clients monthly. $29/month subscription with SendGrid and Stripe integrations.
pass_2.hld_document: FastAPI backend with PostgreSQL database. React frontend deployed on Vercel. Core entities: User, Client, Invoice, PaymentStatus. Invoice workflow: create invoice form -> generate PDF -> email to client -> track payment status -> automated reminder job. SendGrid handles transactional emails. Stripe manages user subscriptions. Background jobs process overdue invoice reminders daily.
engineering_questions: PDF generation library preference: ReportLab vs WeasyPrint?
Background job queue: Celery with Redis or simple cron jobs?
File storage for invoice PDFs: local filesystem or S3?

pass_3.qa_hlt_document: Test invoice creation with multiple line items and tax calculations. Verify PDF generation with user logo upload. Test client database CRUD operations. Validate payment status transitions (unpaid -> paid -> overdue). Test automated reminder email delivery and scheduling. Verify Stripe subscription webhook handling. Test user registration and email verification flow.

test_vectors.description: Create invoice with 5 line items, verify PDF formatting and email delivery
Mark invoice overdue, verify automated reminder email sent after 7 days
User subscription expires, verify access restrictions and billing retry

risk_register.description: Email deliverability issues with invoice delivery affecting user trust
PDF generation failures with custom logos or formatting edge cases
Background job failures causing missed payment reminders

qa_questions_for_engineering: How do we handle email bounces and delivery failures?
What's the fallback if PDF generation fails?
How do we monitor and alert on background job failures?

combined_task_list.description: Setup FastAPI project structure and PostgreSQL database
Implement user registration and email verification
Create invoice generation form and PDF service
Setup SendGrid integration for invoice delivery
Build automated reminder background job system
Create React frontend dashboard and forms
Test invoice PDF generation with various formats
Day 2 check-in on project setup progress
Day 4 review of user auth implementation
Day 6 demo of invoice generation feature

pass_5.proposal_document_for_hero: InvoiceFlow MVP - 9-day build plan for invoice creation and payment tracking platform. Includes user authentication, client management, PDF invoice generation, automated email reminders, and Stripe subscription billing. FastAPI backend with React frontend. Key integrations: SendGrid for email delivery, Stripe for subscriptions. Deliverable: Full working MVP with user registration, invoice creation, payment tracking dashboard, and automated overdue reminders.

hero_questions: Should we add invoice templates or keep single branded format for MVP?
Do you want configurable reminder intervals or fixed 7-day reminders?
Should we include basic reporting dashboard or defer to post-MVP?
